'''鈭歡-th-j''' ('''kagathaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unblade|unblade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unblade|unblade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-th-j
|-
! Lemma
| kagathaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigathaj|thigathaj]] || [[word:jigathaj|jigathaj]] || [[word:shigathaj|shigathaj]] || [[word:kigathaj|kigathaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugathaj|thuthugathaj]] || [[word:jujugathaj|jujugathaj]] || [[word:shushugathaj|shushugathaj]] || [[word:kukugathaj|kukugathaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugathaj|thugathaj]] || [[word:jugathaj|jugathaj]] || [[word:shugathaj|shugathaj]] || [[word:kugathaj|kugathaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugathaj|thugathaj]] || [[word:jugathaj|jugathaj]] || [[word:shugathaj|shugathaj]] || [[word:kugathaj|kugathaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegathaj|thegathaj]] || [[word:jegathaj|jegathaj]] || [[word:shegathaj|shegathaj]] || [[word:kegathaj|kegathaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogathaj|thothogathaj]] || [[word:jojogathaj|jojogathaj]] || [[word:shoshogathaj|shoshogathaj]] || [[word:kokogathaj|kokogathaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogathaj|thogathaj]] || [[word:jogathaj|jogathaj]] || [[word:shogathaj|shogathaj]] || [[word:kogathaj|kogathaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogathaj|thogathaj]] || [[word:jogathaj|jogathaj]] || [[word:shogathaj|shogathaj]] || [[word:kogathaj|kogathaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gathaj|th忙gathaj]] || [[word:j忙gathaj|j忙gathaj]] || [[word:sh忙gathaj|sh忙gathaj]] || [[word:k忙gathaj|k忙gathaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagathaj|thathagathaj]] || [[word:jajagathaj|jajagathaj]] || [[word:shashagathaj|shashagathaj]] || [[word:kakagathaj|kakagathaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagathaj|thagathaj]] || [[word:jagathaj|jagathaj]] || [[word:shagathaj|shagathaj]] || [[word:kagathaj|kagathaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagathaj|thagathaj]] || [[word:jagathaj|jagathaj]] || [[word:shagathaj|shagathaj]] || [[word:kagathaj|kagathaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagathaj|shagathaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagathaj|goshagathaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagathaj|gokishagathaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagathajn眉|shagathajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagathajnkn眉|goshagathajnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathajn眉|gokishagathajn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagathajsh毛|shagathajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagathajnksh毛|goshagathajnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagathajsh毛|gokishagathajsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathajro|shagathajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathajnkro|goshagathajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathajro|gokishagathajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathajmu|shagathajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathajnkmu|goshagathajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathajmu|gokishagathajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagathajsher|shagathajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagathajnksher|goshagathajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagathajsher|gokishagathajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagathajng|shagathajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagathajnkng|goshagathajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagathajng|gokishagathajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagathajya|shagathajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagathajnkya|goshagathajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagathajya|gokishagathajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagathajyam|shagathajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagathajnkyam|goshagathajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagathajyam|gokishagathajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathajn眉sh毛|shagathajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathajnkn眉sh毛|goshagathajnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathajn眉sh毛|gokishagathajn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathajn眉ro|shagathajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathajnkn眉ro|goshagathajnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathajn眉ro|gokishagathajn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathajn眉mu|shagathajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathajnkn眉mu|goshagathajnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathajn眉mu|gokishagathajn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathajsh毛n眉|shagathajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathajnksh毛n眉|goshagathajnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathajsh毛n眉|gokishagathajsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathajsh毛ro|shagathajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathajnksh毛ro|goshagathajnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathajsh毛ro|gokishagathajsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathajsh毛mu|shagathajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathajnksh毛mu|goshagathajnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathajsh毛mu|gokishagathajsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathajron眉|shagathajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathajnkron眉|goshagathajnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathajron眉|gokishagathajron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathajrosh毛|shagathajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathajnkrosh毛|goshagathajnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathajrosh毛|gokishagathajrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathajromu|shagathajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathajnkromu|goshagathajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathajromu|gokishagathajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathajmun眉|shagathajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathajnkmun眉|goshagathajnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathajmun眉|gokishagathajmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathajmush毛|shagathajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathajnkmush毛|goshagathajnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathajmush毛|gokishagathajmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathajmuro|shagathajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathajnkmuro|goshagathajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathajmuro|gokishagathajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
